name: Supermarket Bash
short_description: This is a happy and tense weekend. The rush to buy in the supermarket has quietly begun. As a member of this family, are you ready to contribute to this carnival?
detailed_description: "Supermarket Bash" is a casual game with simple operations. The game contains several different levels. In each level, you need to play a certain family member to complete specified tasks or collect specified items. Obtain corresponding rewards or achieve level goals. For example, mother needs to always keep an eye on the products that are about to be discounted and grab the products before the inventory reaches zero. In the end, I hope you can return from the game with a full load.
